Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the Docker base image to use Eclipse Temurin JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 to align with the target runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or meeting the migration requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly configure maven compiler source and target properties to match the java.version property.
Add a property for the Lombok version to centralize version management.
Add the central Maven repository definition explicitly.
Add H2 database dependency for testing purposes.
Add Spring Kafka Test dependency for testing Kafka components.
Add Spring Boot Starter Validation dependency for bean validation.
Update Lombok dependency to use the managed version property and change scope to provided.
Add MapStruct dependency for object mapping.
Add Flyway core dependency for database migrations.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin with fork, release version, and annotation processor paths for Lombok and MapStruct.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this configuration, Lombok and MapStruct annotations may not be processed correctly during compilation, leading to compile errors.

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Extract hardcoded API path strings into a constants class for centralized configuration.
Rename local variable 'service' to 'productService' for better semantic clarity.
Simplify getAllProducts endpoint by removing optional category filtering logic.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.before: public List<Product> getAllProducts(@RequestParam(required = false) String category) { if (category != null) { return service.getProductsByCategory(category); } return service.getAllProducts(); }

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Add new endpoint to retrieve product history by ID.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.after: @GetMapping(AppConstants.API.PATH_HISTORY) public List<Product> getProductHistory(@PathVariable Long id) { return productService.getProductHistory(id); }

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Add Jakarta validation annotation to create product request body.
Add Jakarta validation annotation to update product request body.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.before: public Product updateProduct(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody Product product)
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.after: public Product updateProduct(@PathVariable Long id, @Valid @RequestBody Product updatedProduct)

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Rename parameter 'product' to 'updatedProduct' in update method for clarity.
Change delete endpoint return type from void to ResponseEntity<Void> with 204 No Content status.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.before: public void deleteProduct(@PathVariable Long id) { service.deleteProduct(id); }
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.after: public ResponseEntity<Void> deleteProduct(@PathVariable Long id) { productService.deleteProduct(id); return ResponseEntity.noContent().build(); }

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Consolidate individual Jakarta Persistence imports into a wildcard import.
Add import for application constants used in validation messages.
Add imports for Jakarta Validation constraints.
Add imports for Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate.
Add import for LocalDateTime used in new event tracking fields.
Add Lombok annotations to generate getters, setters, and constructors automatically.
Change class inheritance to extend TenantEntity for multi-tenancy support.
Remove manual default constructor as it is now provided by Lombok @NoArgsConstructor.
Remove manual all-args constructor as it is now provided by Lombok @AllArgsConstructor.
Remove manual getter and setter methods as they are now provided by Lombok @Getter and @Setter.
Add validation constraints to the name field using constants.
Add validation constraints to the description field using constants.
Add validation constraints to the category field using constants.
Add validation constraints to the price field using constants.
Add validation constraints to the stockQuantity field using constants.
Add new fields for event sourcing/tracking (originalProductId, eventType, eventTime).
Add a new specific constructor for creating products with name, price, and current event time.
Replace the simple category-based search with a multi-tenant product lookup method.
Add a custom JPQL query to retrieve current products for a specific tenant.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.after:
@Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.tenantId = :tenantId AND (p.eventType IS NULL OR p.eventType = 'CREATED')")
List<Product> findCurrentProductsByTenant(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Add a custom JPQL query to find a product by ID and tenant ID.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.after:
@Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.id = :id AND p.tenantId = :tenantId")
Optional<Product> findByIdAndTenantId(@Param("id") Long id, @Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Add a custom JPQL query to find all products for a specific tenant.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.after:
@Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.tenantId = :tenantId")
List<Product> findAllByTenantId(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);
